message:
test(golden,bd-q931h): pin status and doctor base-state JSON shape contracts

Audit of tests/golden/robot/ (2026-04-24) found no status_shape.json.golden
and no doctor_shape.json.golden. The pins that existed were all
variant-scoped: status_quarantine{_full}.json.golden,
status_semantic_{backfill_wait,progress}.json.golden, and
doctor_quarantine.json.golden (four instances + one instance — all
concrete values, no JSON Schema shape). The base not-initialized
envelopes emitted for `cass status --json` / `cass doctor --json`
on a fresh empty data_dir — the most common shape agent harnesses
see before the first index — had no structural pin at all. A
regression that added, removed, or re-typed a field in the base
envelope would compile clean and pass the whole existing suite.

Adds two shape goldens backed by json_value_schema, mirroring the
health_shape_matches_golden / diag_shape_matches_golden pattern:
- robot/status_shape.json.golden (21 KB — full status envelope
  including nested index, database, pending, rebuild.pipeline,
  semantic, quarantine blocks).
- robot/doctor_shape.json.golden (11 KB — status / healthy /
  initialized / explanation / recommended_action / checks[] /
  quarantine.summary / warnings / issues_found / auto_fix fields).

Both run against a fresh tempdir (no seeded fixture), exit code 0
per the audit, pass on re-run after golden write, and do not
overlap with the existing variant goldens.

Companion surfaces (capabilities, api-version, health, diag,
models_status, introspect) already had _shape goldens — now status
and doctor match.

Closes coding_agent_session_search-q931h.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
